name: kiran gajjana
message: my test was stopped i the middle by showikng the warning that i was unaware off can you help me to retake the test
diagnosis: The candidate's MCQ test was prematurely stopped due to a proctoring warning, which they claim they were unaware of. This likely indicates an accidental tab-switching or similar proctoring rule violation.
justification: The candidate's test was stopped mid-assessment due to a warning they were unaware of, which falls under the 'Proctoring / Tab-Switching Violations' guardrail. As per the rules, candidates who claim unawareness of strict proctoring rules are eligible for a reset for one more attempt, giving them the benefit of the doubt.
resolution_log: Auto-approved reset. Justification: The candidate's test was stopped mid-assessment due to a warning they were unaware of, which falls under the 'Proctoring / Tab-Switching Violations' guardrail. As per the rules, candidates who claim unawareness of strict proctoring rules are eligible for a reset for one more attempt, giving them the benefit of the doubt.
candidate_notification: Hello Kiran, we understand your test was stopped due to a proctoring warning you weren't aware of. We've gone ahead and reset your access to the MCQ test. You can now re-register and attempt the test immediately! Please remember that strict tab-switching rules are in place during the assessment, so ensure you stay on the test window to avoid any interruptions.
